headline: Trump says U.S. will build first refinery in 50 years with investment from India's Reliance Industries
summary: U.S. President said India's largest private energy company Reliance Industries is investing in a $300-billion refinery project in Texas.

headline: Elon Musk's xAI wins permit to build power plant in Mississippi despite pollution concerns
summary: Mississippi regulators authorized xAI to build a power plant with 41 natural gas-burning turbines in Southaven to power its nearby data centers.

headline: Strong Q4 2025 Caps Record Year For Midstream/MLP Buybacks
summary: Aggregate equity repurchases for midstream MLPs and corporations remained healthy in Q4 2025. This note looks at 4Q25 repurchase activity and compares 2025 total buybacks with recent years.

headline: Oil and Gas Infrastructure Industry Report 2026-2035 Featuring NGL Energy Partners, Centrica, Kinder Morgan, Schlumberger, Royal Vopak NV, Shell PLC, Exxon Mobil, Baker Hughes, Chevron, TotalEnergies
summary: Key opportunities in the oil and gas infrastructure market include growth driven by rising natural gas demand, expansion of pipeline and storage infrastructure, modernization of assets, increased LNG trade, and development of resilient supply chains. Innovations in tech-driven solutions and strategic acquisitions enhance market reach. headline: Retirees Chasing Monthly Cash Flow From This ETF May Be Surprised by the Fine Print
summary: EINC has returned 29.99% gain over the past year while continuing to pay quarterly distributions.
